view.title: Territory {hostname}
view.name: Hero Name:
view.allGoodNoErrors: All good! No errors in contact scroll information!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome raven?
view.welcomeEmailResent: The welcome raven has been resent. Check your messenger raven perch.

order.findDomain: Find your territory and check availability.
order.premiumAvailable: Hail! Your territory {domain} is available and it is a premium domain. Automatic registration is sealed. Send a raven to {email} if you would like to claim this territory for {cost} per year.
order.premiumTaken: Alas! Your territory {domain} is already claimed! You already own it? You may transfer it, and it is a premium domain. Automatic registration is sealed. Send a raven to {email} if you would like to claim this territory for {cost} per year.
order.available: Hail! Your territory {domain} is available! You may claim it for {cost}. Renewal gold cost will be {renewal}.
order.taken: Alas! Your territory {domain} is already claimed! You already own it? You may transfer it for {cost}. Renewal gold cost will be {renewal}.
order.whatIsWhoisPrivacy: What is this Whois Privacy Ward?
order.agreeToTerms: Agree to the guild charter terms
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The subscription will automatically renew after every year at {cost} until abandoned.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By checking this rune, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the coin purse you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the guild portal (Here) select the active service and click the Abandon link or send a raven to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Guild Charter and Privacy Scroll. By checking the rune and clicking Place My Commission below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Guild Charter and Privacy Scroll.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have read the terms above and I agree.
order.searchingDomain: One moment, adventurer! Searching for this territory name.
order.loadingDomainFields: One moment, adventurer! Loading territory fields.

nameservers.title: Territory Nameservers
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Suggested nameservers have been applied. Click Level Up to inscribe.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: You are about to smite your territory nameserver.

eppCode.title: Dispatch EPP Code via Raven
eppCode.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to send the EPP Code to the registered raven address?

whois.title: Whois Privacy Ward
whois.renewalNote: Whois Privacy Ward gets renewed every 12 moons from the date of activation. Whois Privacy Ward addon renewal gold cost is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Whois Privacy Ward is not available for this TLD.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Whois Privacy Ward is currently activated for {hostname}.
whois.disableAndCancel: Deactivate and Abandon Whois Privacy Ward
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Privacy Ward conceals the identity of a Registrant when an adventurer performs a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's territory.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of having Contact Privacy Ward is that the Registrant's identity, including stronghold address, messenger pigeon number, and raven address, is shielded from dark mages, identity thieves and scammers.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants activate the Contact Privacy Ward, masked contact information appears in the public WHOIS records.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact privacy ward is available for {cost} per territory per year.
whois.enableNow: To activate Contact Privacy Ward for your Territory, Place Commission Now.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Whois Privacy Ward gold cost: {cost} per year. Are you sure you want to place this commission?
whois.orderSuccess: Whois privacy ward commission placed successfully!
whois.enableMessage: Your territory {hostname} has a paid whois privacy ward addon that is not yet activated. Would you like to activate it now?
whois.whoisEnabled: Whois Privacy Ward is now activated.
whois.disableTitle: Deactivate and Abandon Whois Privacy Ward
whois.disableMessage: Your territory {hostname} Whois Privacy Ward addon is currently activated. Are you sure you want to deactivate and abandon it?
whois.whoisDisabled: Whois Privacy Ward has been deactivated and abandoned.

whoisToggle.title: Whois Privacy Ward Addon
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Your territory {domain} Whois Privacy Ward addon is Activated
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Your territory {domain} Whois Privacy Ward addon is Deactivated
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to Activate Whois?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to Deactivate and Abandon it?

lock.title: Territory Lock/Unlock
lock.activateLock: Do you want to Activate the territory lock?
lock.inactivateLock: Do you want to Deactivate the territory lock?

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Arcane Information
dnssec.enterDigest: Enter Value of Digest (Must not exceed {max} Characters)
dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This will smite all DNSSEC records for this territory.
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Please fill in at least one DNSSEC record.

renew.title: Renew Territory
renew.tip1: Territory should be renewed on or before expiry date.
renew.tip2: If territory has lapsed it may have a grace period from expiry date to renew.
renew.tip3: Activate Whois Privacy Ward to conceal your Contact Scroll Information when an adventurer performs a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's territory.
renew.alreadyRenewed: You have already renewed your territory, brave adventurer!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew your territory, kindly pay the existing gold due notice.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total gold cost: {cost}. Are you sure you want to place this renewal commission?

transfer.title: Transfer Quest Status
transfer.notATransfer: This territory is not a transfer.
